PATIENT_ID: TEST_CLABSI_NOCULTURE_001
ARRIVAL_TIME: 2026-01-15 08:00:00

[NURSING_NOTE] 2026-01-15 10:00:00
Central venous catheter in place, right internal jugular.
CVL site clean.

[LAB] 2026-01-19 08:00:00
Blood cultures drawn — no growth at 5 days.
CBC within normal limits.

[PHYSICIAN_NOTE] 2026-01-19 10:00:00
Patient febrile, temperature 38.6 C.
Suspected central line-associated bloodstream infection.
Blood cultures negative, no organism identified.
New onset fever on hospital day 4.
